mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, status, deleted, login_fail_count, lock_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, status, deleted, login_fail_count, lock_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{status}, 0, 0, NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = #{deleted}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = #{loginFailCount}, lock_time = #{lockTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET login_fail_count = 0, lock_time = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
